perturbed_task_language: Pick the salad dressing and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: loose-object positions swapped; both salad_dressing and basket localized purely by depth back-projection
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely picks/places at base (un-swapped) locations
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated localization (no GT coords). Coarse agentview pass on world_00.npy: clustered above-table pixels (z>0.05), then narrowed by color/shape. First attempt picked the LEFT red bottle at world (-0.107,-0.237,top_z~0.097) using 'pick up the salad dressing'. Pi0 lifted+placed it in the basket but predicate did NOT fire => that bottle was ketchup, not salad_dressing. Reset and retried with the DARK back-center bottle at world (-0.185,-0.088,top_z~0.144) — that one matched the salad_dressing predicate. Recipe: reset -> move_to (-0.185,-0.088,0.20) gripper open -> pi0_pick max_chunks=10 (small chunk budget so Pi0 only does the grasp, not a full place) -> move_to (0.076,0.231,0.35) carry above basket (basket localized via world_00.npy cluster at high-z near right side, basket-center xy ~ (0.076,0.231)) -> release. libero_terminated fired on release step_20.
